name: Pecan Glazed Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, using a wire whisk, whisk together eggs, pumpkin, evaporated milk, 3/4 cup brown sugar and pumpkin pie spice. Place the frozen pie crust on the preheated baking sheet. Pour the filling into the crust. Bake for 40 minutes. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1/4 cup sugar, pecans and melted butter. Crumble over the top of the partially baked pie. Bake an additional 30 minutes, or until set.
